allowed_diff_reason: Known InMemory event aliasing after update_session() can duplicate post-summary events until the backend bug is fixed.

operations.text: I need help planning a Shenzhen trip

operations.author: agent
operations.text: What dates and budget do you have

operations.author: user
operations.text: I will travel next weekend with a small budget

operations.author: user
operations.text: I prefer a hotel near the station

operations.author: agent
operations.text: I will remember the station hotel preference
User is planning a budget Shenzhen trip next weekend, prefers train travel and a station hotel, and requested weather information.

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Shenzhen will be sunny and warm

operations.author: user
operations.text: Give me a final short itinerary

operations.author: agent
operations.text: Take the train, stay near the station, and pack light clothes
Budget Shenzhen trip: train travel, station hotel, sunny 28 degree weather, and a short itinerary were discussed.
